actions.description: Log in using admin@example.com and admin123 from prerequisites

actions.instruction: Navigate to the extensions admin page
actions.description: Navigate to the extensions admin page

actions.instruction: Wait for the extensions toolbar and card grid to load
actions.description: Wait for the extensions toolbar and card grid to appear and be visible.

actions.instruction: Open the Inactive filter tab to show deactivated extensions
actions.description: Click the Inactive filter tab to show deactivated extensions

actions.instruction: Find an inactive extension card with a visible "Remove" button or unchecked toggle
actions.description: Verify that an inactive extension card with a visible 'Remove' button is present

actions.instruction: Click the toggle switch label inside the first element with class `.inactive-extension-card`
actions.description: Click the toggle switch label inside the first element with class '.inactive-extension-card'
Click the confirm/primary button in the visible 'Activate Extension' modal dialog

actions.instruction: Wait for the activation to complete and the success toast to appear
actions.description: Wait for success toast indicating the extension was activated
